remaining_params.SpellDescription: Exile target card from a graveyard. Create a Mutagen token.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose target card in a graveyard

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it leaves the battlefield, create a Mutagen token for each +1/+1 counter on it. (A Mutagen token is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")
